meta.title: PatenteYes — Pass the Italian driving licence in your language
meta.description: The app for immigrants taking the Italian driving licence theory exam. With a personal AI instructor in Italian, Arabic, Urdu, Hindi and Chinese.

hero.title: Pass the Italian driving licence in your language.
hero.subtitle: With your personal AI instructor. Available in Italian, Arabic, Urdu, Hindi and Chinese.
hero.earlyBird: Early signups get 30% off at launch

trust.stat1: +110,000 immigrants take the exam every year

problem.title: Studying for the Italian driving licence is hard when Italian isn't your language.
problem.subtitle: Thousands postpone the exam every year. You don't have to be one of them.
problem.p1Desc: The official quiz is only in Italian. Complex technical terms make studying frustrating.
problem.p2Desc: Between €800 and €1,200 for a full course. An expense many can't afford.
problem.p3Desc: 40% of foreigners don't pass on their first try. Every failed exam is another €30 spent.

solution.title: PatenteYes speaks your language.
solution.subtitle: Everything you need to pass the theory exam, in one app.
solution.f1Desc: All 7,000+ official questions translated and explained by native experts.
solution.f2Desc: Name your instructor. Answers your questions 24/7 in your language.
solution.f3Desc: Mock exams identical to the real one. As many times as you want.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four steps to your driving licence.
howItWorks.s1Desc: Italian, Arabic, Urdu, Hindi or Chinese.
howItWorks.s3Desc: Chapters, videos, quizzes. Even 10 minutes a day works.
howItWorks.s4Desc: Book it and get your licence with confidence.

comparison.title: Compare your options
comparison.subtitle: See why PatenteYes is the smarter choice.

languages.title: Available in 5 languages
languages.subtitle: Pick the one you're most comfortable in.

social.title: Reviews
social.placeholder: Testimonials from our first users will appear here after launch.

mission.title: PatenteYes isn't just an app. It's a tool for integration.
mission.body: We believe mobility is freedom. For many immigrants in Italy, a driving licence is the key to a better job, an independent life and real integration. We're building PatenteYes to break down the language barrier that today blocks hundreds of thousands of people.

finalCta.title: Be among the first to try PatenteYes.
finalCta.subtitle: Join the waitlist and get 30% off at launch.
finalCta.trust: No spam. Just the launch announcement and your early-bird discount.

waitlist.languageQuestion: Which language do you prefer to study in?
waitlist.successBody: We sent you an email to confirm your signup. Check your inbox.
waitlist.duplicate: You're already on the list — we'll write to you in June!
waitlist.error: Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.
waitlist.confirmedBody: Thank you. In June 2026 you'll be among the first to know when PatenteYes is available.

footer.tagline: The Italian driving licence, in your language.
